description: This video explains the concepts of hard forks and soft forks in blockchain technology, detailing how hard forks create two separate networks and how soft forks maintain backward compatibility.
topic_summary: Hard forks create incompatible changes leading to two distinct networks [t=0:48]. Soft forks allow upgrades without disrupting the existing network [t=17:52].
aliases: What Are Hard Forks & Soft Forks
Hard Forks and Soft Forks Explained
Understanding Hard Forks and Soft Forks
